message:
Add TUI smoke tests with headless execution support

Add tests/tui_smoke.rs (coding_agent_session_search-xjt3):
- E2E smoke tests for TUI launch, search input, exit paths
- Headless mode execution via TUI_HEADLESS=1 and --once
- State snapshot capture and key event logging
- Validate exit codes and panic-free operation on empty datasets
- CI-compatible without manual interaction
- Fixture builders for Codex and Claude Code session formats

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
